posts.title: AI Commit - Privacy-First Git Assistant
posts.description: Just shipped a new AI tool that generates intelligent git commit messages using local LLMs! Privacy-first approach with zero data leaving your machine. Check out the project on GitHub!

posts.title: Building RAG-Based AI Applications
posts.description: Excited to share my journey building RAG-based AI applications! Document Q&A with explainable retrieval is just the beginning. The future of AI is about building systems that are both intelligent and interpretable.

posts.title: AutoML Studio - End-to-End ML Platform
posts.description: AutoML Studio is live! Built an end-to-end ML platform that automates EDA, preprocessing, training, and evaluation. Because every data scientist deserves more time for actual problem-solving.

posts.title: Open Source Journey Begins
posts.description: Started my open source journey! Sharing everything I build publicly. Learning by building - not just consuming tutorials. Grateful for the amazing developer community.

posts.title: Machine Learning & System Design
posts.description: Deep diving into ML evaluation metrics and system design for AI applications. Focusing on retrieval pipelines and deployment strategies. The intersection of ML and software engineering is fascinating!
